1 Other major spinal surgery requiring SNF service.
778 J2500_ORTHO_SRGRY_SHLDR_IND J2500_ORTHO_SRGRY_SHLDR_IND J2500 Ortho Surgery - RPR Frctrd Shoulder/Arm CHAR 1 Repair fractures of the shoulder (including clavicle and scapula) or arm (but not hand).
779 J2510_ORTHO_SRGRY_PELVIS_IND J2510_ORTHO_SRGRY_PELVIS_IND J2510 Ortho Surgery - RPR Frctrd Pelvis/Hip/Leg/Knee/Ankle CHAR 1 Repair fractures of the pelvis, hip, leg, knee, or ankle (not foot).
780 J2520_ORTHO_SRGRY_JNT_IND
